title: Guacamole Yesterdays
overview: Ames, a cartoonist reeling from heartbreak, agrees to an experimental therapy that allows her to relive and reshape her memories of her ex. As she replays first kisses, awkward arguments, and quiet heartbreaks, she begins to question what’s real, what’s imagined, and whether altering your memories can actually heal you… or just bury the truth.
